stemHtml: What does the callsign of an aeronautical station consists of?

options.a: The telephony designator of the aeronautical station followed by the service available.
options.b: The name of the aeronautical station being called followed by the service requested.
options.c: The name of the location being called followed by the unit or service available.
options.d: The designator of the location followed by the requested service.
